observation.images.image_0.comment: Single Bridge/WidowX external view (GR00T modality key video.image_0). The agent maps the env's single `image` here and cv2-resizes (square squash, NOT pad) to 256x256 uint8 — matches the official Isaac-GR00T SimplerEnv eval (gr00t/eval/sim/SimplerEnv/simpler_env.py: cv2.resize(img,(256,256))).

observation.text.comment: Task instruction. GR00T language modality key annotation.human.action.task_description; fed as language={key: [[instruction]]}.

observation.state.eef_pos.comment: EE position (base frame). min/max are the checkpoint's q01/q99 percentiles (use_percentiles=true). GR00T state keys x,y,z.

observation.state.eef_euler.comment: EE orientation as extrinsic-XYZ euler. The official eval derives this from the EE quaternion with a Bridge orientation correction: rpy = mat2euler(quat2mat(q) @ default_rot.T), default_rot=[[0,0,1],[0,1,0],[-1,0,0]]. The HUD env emits ee_abs proprio as axis-angle, so the agent reconstructs the rotation matrix from axis-angle and applies the SAME correction. OPEN: euler order (extrinsic XYZ) matches scipy te.mat2euler default; verify against the env's axis-angle base frame.

observation.state.pad.comment: Always-zero padding slot (GR00T state key `pad`); carries no information (all-zero stats).

observation.state.gripper.comment: Gripper openness scalar (GR00T state key `gripper`, ~[0,1.1]). OPEN: the official eval uses the WidowX `eef_pos[7]` openness; the HUD env emits two finger qpos (m) instead, so the agent feeds an approximate scalar (finger-qpos sum) here — units differ; GR00T's 0.2 state-dropout mitigates this, and the gripper STATE does not affect the emitted action (only conditioning).

action.delta_eef_pos.comment: EE translation delta (GR00T action keys x,y,z). Values are small per-step deltas (std ~0.01); min/max are q01/q99. Sent directly to the env's ee_del action (dims 0-2).

action.delta_eef_euler.comment: EE rotation delta as euler XYZ (GR00T action keys roll,pitch,yaw). The HUD simpler env's ee_del action is AXIS-ANGLE, so the agent converts euler->rotvec (scipy R.from_euler('xyz').as_rotvec()), exactly as the validated vla_jepa_widowx agent does. state_type EE_DEL_ROT matches the env (representation differs by design; the adapter reconciles).

action.gripper.comment: Absolute gripper in [0,1] (1=open, 0=close in GR00T training). The official eval binarizes to SimplerEnv [-1,1] via 2*(g>0.5)-1 (so open->+1, close->-1); the HUD simpler env's gripper action is the same [-1,1] range, so the agent emits {+1 open / -1 close}.

comment: NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1.7 post-trained on SimplerEnv Bridge/WidowX (nvidia/GR00T-N1.7-SimplerEnv-Bridge, EmbodimentTag.SIMPLER_ENV_WIDOWX). Cosmos-Reason2-2B VLM backbone + flow-matching DiT action head (4 denoising steps, 3B params). Inference via gr00t.policy.gr00t_policy.Gr00tPolicy.get_action({'video':{image_0},'state':{x,y,z,roll,pitch,yaw,pad,gripper},'language':{...}}) -> action chunk (T=8) of {x,y,z,roll,pitch,yaw,gripper}. Action signature EE_DEL_POS+EE_DEL_ROT+GRIPPER_ABS_POS matches the simpler env (widowx.json). Official SimplerEnv eval runs n_action_steps=1 (re-infer every step, execute chunk[0]); the agent mirrors this (open_loop_horizon=1). Pairs the `simpler` env (BENCH_CONTROL=delta). Requires the `gr00t` package (NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T) installed; not a LeRobot policy (custom GR00TModel).
